title: Venezuelan Empanada Dessert
description: A sweet twist on traditional empanadas, filled with a malty berry mixture and topped with a crunchy juniper crust.

ingredients.name: Berries
ingredients.notes: Mixed berries such as strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries

instructions: Mix the malty crust dough ingredients and knead for 5 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Cut out circles of dough for the empanada crust.
Fill the empanadas with the Venezuelan empanada filling.
Top the empanadas with a sprinkle of juniper crunch.
Bake the empanadas for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with a scoop of ice cream.
